title: crepidium roohutuensis
intro: Crepidium roohutuensis, also known as the Rohutu orchid, is a rare species of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The Rohutu orchid is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Crepidium roohutuensis involve boiling the roots in water to create a tea or infusing the plant in oil for topical applications.
